content:
Define the TopModule interface with exactly the specified ports and widths: clk, reset, in_valid, in[7:0], out_valid, and out[7:0]. Do not add, remove, or rename any ports.

Retrieved Related Information:
Info 1: clk: input logic, 1-bit (Type: Signal)
Info 2: in_valid: input logic, 1-bit (Type: Signal)
Info 3: in: input logic [7:0] (Type: Signal)
Info 4: out_valid: output logic, 1-bit (Type: Signal)
Info 5: out: output logic [7:0] (Type: Signal)
Info 6: reset is active-high synchronous and clears all output registers. (Type: StateTransition)
source:
Implement a module named TopModule with the following interface:

- input  logic       clk
- input  logic       reset
- input  logic       in_valid
- input  logic [7:0] in
- output logic       out_valid
- output logic [7:0] out

[Strict Interface Contract]
Your generated TopModule must keep the exact port names and widths below.
Do not rename ports. Do not add/remove ports. Do not change bit-widths.
- clk: 1-bit
- in: [7:0]
- in_valid: 1-bit
- out: [7:0]
- out_valid: 1-bit
- reset: 1-bit

content:
Implement out_valid as a positive-edge clocked output register. On active-high synchronous reset, clear out_valid to 0. Otherwise, register in_valid directly so that out_valid reflects the previous cycle's in_valid.

Retrieved Related Information:
Info 1: reset: input logic, 1-bit, active-high synchronous and clears all output registers. (Type: Signal)
Info 2: in_valid: input logic, 1-bit. (Type: Signal)
Info 3: out_valid: output logic, 1-bit. (Type: Signal)
Info 4: reset is active-high synchronous and clears all output registers. (Type: StateTransition)
Info 5: When in_valid is 1 at cycle N, out_valid must be 1 at cycle N+1. (Type: StateTransition)
Info 6: When in_valid is 0 at cycle N, out_valid must be 0 at cycle N+1. (Type: StateTransition)
Info 7: Use a 1-cycle pipeline from accepted input to output. (Type: StateTransition)
source:
Behavior requirements:
1. Use a 1-cycle pipeline from accepted input to output.
2. When in_valid is 1 at cycle N, out_valid must be 1 at cycle N+1 and out must equal (in + 8'd1) from cycle N.
3. When in_valid is 0 at cycle N, out_valid must be 0 at cycle N+1.
4. reset is active-high synchronous and clears all output registers.

content:
Implement out as a positive-edge clocked output register. On active-high synchronous reset, clear out to 8'd0. Otherwise, register the shallow datapath result in + 8'd1 directly into out, preserving the required 1-cycle pipeline timing from input to output.

Retrieved Related Information:
Info 1: reset: input logic, 1-bit, active-high synchronous and clears all output registers. (Type: Signal)
Info 2: in: input logic [7:0]. (Type: Signal)
Info 3: out: output logic [7:0]. (Type: Signal)
Info 4: reset is active-high synchronous and clears all output registers. (Type: StateTransition)
Info 5: When in_valid is 1 at cycle N, out_valid must be 1 at cycle N+1 and out must equal (in + 8'd1) from cycle N. (Type: StateTransition)
Info 6: Use a 1-cycle pipeline from accepted input to output. (Type: StateTransition)
source:
Behavior requirements:
1. Use a 1-cycle pipeline from accepted input to output.
2. When in_valid is 1 at cycle N, out_valid must be 1 at cycle N+1 and out must equal (in + 8'd1) from cycle N.
4. reset is active-high synchronous and clears all output registers.

Optimization direction: performance-first.
- keep the datapath shallow
- preserve exact functionality and 1-cycle pipeline timing
